display.purpose: Hero headlines and major brand claims only.

title.purpose: Cards, module headings, and device titles.

body.purpose: Main prose, form copy, and explanatory content.

label.purpose: Badges, metadata, compact facts, and footer links.

shadows.name: product-grounding
shadows.purpose: Grounds major product renders and hero/detail device imagery.

shadows.name: soft-product
shadows.purpose: Subtle support for product objects and rare lifted visual moments.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Accessible input focus state paired with an action-blue border.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.value: background-color .25s ease, color .25s ease, border-color .25s ease, transform .15s ease
motion.purpose: Default button and control state transition.

motion.name: quiet-reveal
motion.purpose: Reserved reveal motion that must leave content visible by default.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary forward action for lead entry, catalog paths, and form submission.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 980px; background: var(--color-apple-blue, #0071e3); color: #fff; padding: 12px 22px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.016em; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color .25s ease, transform .15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0077ed; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,113,227,0.32); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outlined Button
components.description: Secondary exploration action for Store, Passport, Trade, and detail pages.
components.css: .ds-btn-outlined { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid var(--color-link-blue, #0066cc); border-radius: 980px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-link-blue, #0066cc); padding: 12px 22px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.016em; white-space: nowrap; transition: background-color .25s ease, transform .15s ease; } .ds-btn-outlined:hover { background: rgba(0,102,204,0.06); } .ds-btn-outlined:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-outlined:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,113,227,0.32); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Catalog filter pill with a quiet active state.
components.css: .ds-filter-chip { border: 1px solid var(--color-hairline, #d2d2d7); border-radius: 980px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-graphite, #474747); min-height: 34px; padding: 6px 14px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; transition: border-color .2s ease, background-color .2s ease, color .2s ease; } .ds-filter-chip:hover, .ds-filter-chip-active { color: var(--color-link-blue, #0066cc); border-color: var(--color-link-blue, #0066cc); background: rgba(0,102,204,0.04); } .ds-filter-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,113,227,0.32); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Device Card
components.description: Flat verified device dossier used in the catalog.
components.html:
В наличии

iPhone 13 Pro

256 GB · Graphite

59 900 ₽
components.css: .ds-device-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; width: 280px; min-height: 430px; border: 1px solid var(--color-hairline, #d2d2d7); border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; overflow: hidden; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--color-carbon, #1d1d1f); transition: border-color .22s ease, transform .18s ease; } .ds-device-card:hover { border-color: rgba(0,102,204,0.36); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-device-media { height: 176px; background: radial-gradient(70% 60% at 50% 35%, rgba(41,151,255,0.12), transparent 62%), var(--color-frost, #f5f5f7); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-hairline, #d2d2d7); } .ds-device-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; padding: 22px; flex: 1; } .ds-stock { align-self: flex-start; border-radius: 980px; padding: 4px 9px; background: rgba(52,199,89,0.1); color: #237a3b; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-device-card h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 21px; line-height: 1.18; letter-spacing: -0.01em; font-weight: 600; } .ds-device-card p { margin: -10px 0 0; color: var(--color-ash, #707070); font-size: 14px; } .ds-price { margin-top: auto; font-size: 28px; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.015em; font-weight: 600; } .ds-device-cta { border: 1px solid var(--color-link-blue, #0066cc); border-radius: 980px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-link-blue, #0066cc); padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 14px; }

components.name: Lead Form Field
components.description: Quiet frosted input field for final lead intake.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field span { color: var(--color-ash, #707070); font-size: 12px; } .ds-field input { width: 100%; height: 46px; border: 1px solid var(--color-hairline, #d2d2d7); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-frost, #f5f5f7); color: var(--color-carbon, #1d1d1f); padding: 0 14px; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: -0.01em; outline: none; } .ds-field input:focus { border-color: var(--color-apple-blue, #0071e3); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0,113,227,0.14); }

components.name: Header Navigation
components.description: Sticky frosted header with compact brand, links, and primary CTA.
components.html:
I СВОИПроверенная техника для своих
КаталогStorePassportTradeClub
components.css: .ds-nav { min-height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; padding: 6px 32px; background: rgba(245,245,247,0.82); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-hairline, #d2d2d7); backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--color-carbon, #1d1d1f); } .ds-brand { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; color: inherit; text-decoration: none; } .ds-brand span { font-size: 10px; color: var(--color-graphite, #474747); } .ds-links { display: flex; gap: 28px; } .ds-links a { font-size: 12px; color: inherit; opacity: .85; text-decoration: none; } .ds-links a:hover { opacity: 1; } .ds-nav-cta { border: 0; border-radius: 980px; background: var(--color-apple-blue, #0071e3); color: #fff; padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 14px; }

narrative.overview:
ISVOI is a restrained premium storefront for verified devices. The system should feel like a precise private retail room: light, quiet, highly legible, and product-first. It earns trust through calm hierarchy, real device detail, visible verification modules, and predictable paths into Store, Passport, Trade, and Club.

The current visual language is Apple-adjacent by design: near-black ink, cool light surfaces, one confident blue, hairline dividers, pill actions, and carefully cropped product imagery. That restraint is useful, but it must stay attached to ISVOI's own promise: good things move through trusted hands, not through anonymous marketplace noise.

The system explicitly rejects generic electronics-store clutter, aggressive discount banners, anonymous marketplace noise, heavy casino-like promotions, fake luxury, and purely decorative AI-style visuals when real product information is needed.
keyCharacteristics: Light premium surfaces with near-black text and restrained blue actions.
Product and passport information first; decoration only supports trust.
Rounded pills for actions and chips; 8px cards for operational clarity.
Quiet motion and tactile hover states, never attention-hungry animation.
Editor-safe layouts that survive variable Directus content and logo lockups.
Tailwind-first implementation for new React/Next UI; site.css is a transition layer for renderer-generated HTML.

rules.name: The Blue Rarity Rule
rules.body: Blue is an action and verification signal, not wallpaper. If more than one thing in a viewport is shouting in blue, reduce the least important one to neutral.

rules.name: The Trust Contrast Rule
rules.body: Small text must pass WCAG AA. The current signal blue and green statuses are close to the line; when text is 14px or smaller, darken the foreground instead of thinning the message.

rules.name: The No-Mono Costume Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce monospace as shorthand for "technical". ISVOI's technical competence comes from precise content and passport structure, not terminal styling.

rules.name: The Lockup Discipline Rule
rules.body: The logo may carry a second line, but captions must remain clear at header size. If the uploaded logo already includes a descriptor, do not duplicate it with another live caption.

rules.name: The Flat Retail Rule
rules.body: Cards are flat at rest. If a card needs emphasis, use hierarchy, product image quality, or a stronger border state before adding a shadow.

rules.name: The Tailwind-First Migration Rule
rules.body: Do not grow site.css for normal product/catalog/lead UI. Use Tailwind-first React components unless the change specifically touches renderer-generated markup that still depends on site.css.

dos: Do preserve the calm premium Apple-adjacent baseline while making ISVOI's own verification promise more specific.
Do use Action Blue only for decisive forward actions and Link Blue for secondary exploration.
Do keep cards at 8px radius unless a component is explicitly a pill, chip, or device render.
Do use real product imagery and passport facts before decorative visuals.
Do keep Directus-managed logo captions short enough to fit inside the header at mobile widths.
Do verify contrast for all 12-14px labels, badges, and eyebrow text.
Do respect reduced motion; reveal transitions must never hide content by default.
Do build new React/Next product, catalog, lead, and component UI with Tailwind utilities and shared tokens.
Do migrate styling out of site.css when renderer/legacy sections are moved into React.
donts: Don't introduce generic electronics-store clutter, aggressive discount banners, anonymous marketplace noise, heavy casino-like promotions, or fake luxury.
Don't use purely decorative AI-style visuals where real product information, trust signals, and clear navigation are needed.
Don't rely on repeated tiny uppercase eyebrows as section scaffolding. One deliberate label is fine; a page full of them becomes template grammar.
Don't add gradient text, decorative glassmorphism cards, or oversized rounded card panels.
Don't use monospace as a lazy signal of technical competence.
Don't duplicate a logo descriptor: if the uploaded asset already says "Проверенная техника для своих", leave the live caption empty.
Don't let mobile controls remain below comfortable touch size when they are primary filters, menu buttons, or gallery tabs.
Don't add new large global CSS blocks for normal product/catalog/lead UI.
Don't treat site.css as the permanent home for new React component styling.
